message:
fix(fr-runtime): PUBSUB subcommand arity errors match upstream wording [bd-frankenredis-pubsubary]

PUBSUB CHANNELS / NUMPAT / SHARDCHANNELS with wrong arity were
emitting 'ERR syntax error'. Upstream networking.c::pubsubCommand
emits the standard subcommand-specific arity error
'ERR unknown subcommand or wrong number of arguments for <SUBCMD>.
Try PUBSUB HELP.'

Also realigns the live_pubsub_help_and_arity_follow_redis_syntax
test to the new wording.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
